title: omphalodes luciliae subsp. cilicica
intro: Omphalodes luciliae subsp. cilicica is a plant species, also known as a type of forget-me-not, which belongs to the family Boraginaceae. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. Omphalodes luciliae subsp. cilicica is traditionally used to treat various health issues, such as digestive problems, respiratory issues, and skin conditions, due to its health benefits like reducing inflammation and improving immune function. Herbal preparations of this plant are typically made by infusing the leaves in hot water or using them in teas, and it is also used as a dietary supplement in some regions.
